fundamentals.name: VanEck Semiconductor ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The fund normally invests at least 80% of its total assets in securities that comprise the fund's benchmark index. The index includes common stocks and depositary receipts of U.S. exchange-listed companies in the semiconductor industry. Such companies may include medium-capitalization companies and foreign companies that are listed on a U.S. exchange. The fund is non-diversified.

news.paragraph: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) is seeing increased attention following NVIDIA's record Q1 revenues and earnings beat, which has also led to NVIDIA ramping up shareholder returns. While SMH itself does not report earnings, its performance is heavily tied to semiconductor giants like NVIDIA, suggesting a potentially bullish outlook for the ETF. Investors are evaluating whether SMH is the right ETF to own as the sector continues to show strength heading into June.
